name: WenYi Trinity Technology Co., Ltd
summary: WenYi Trinity Technology Co., Ltd manufactures and sells semiconductor plastic packaging molds and equipments in China and internationally. It offers belt conveyor roller bearing housings, seals, and auto parts; extrusion dies, extruders, and auxiliary machines; and LED slabs, LED brackets, points glue machine, etc. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Tongling, China.
